articles.title: Report: Reunion between Patriots, Stefon Diggs viewed as unlikely despite mutual interest
articles.description:
Diggs would be open to the reunion, but the pending trade for A.J. Brown is reportedly a roadblock for bringing him back.

The post Report: Reunion between Patriots, Stefon Diggs viewed as unlikely despite mutual interest appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Stefon Diggs expresses openness to rejoining the Patriots amid ongoing trade discussions.
The potential trade for A.J. Brown complicates Diggs' return to New England.
Boston residents may see a shift in team dynamics if Diggs joins the Patriots.

articles.title: Boston police seek missing boy, 15
articles.description:
Lafayette LaGrant-Gomes was last seen Tuesday afternoon near Blue Hill Avenue in Dorchester, according to Boston police.

The post Boston police seek missing boy, 15 appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Boston police are searching for 15-year-old Lafayette LaGrant-Gomes, missing since Tuesday.
He was last seen near Blue Hill Avenue in Dorchester.
Residents are urged to report any sightings to assist in the search.

articles.title: Firefighter killed, 11 injured in lumber mill explosion and massive fire in Maine
articles.description:
The investigation into the cause of the blast may not immediately offer answers, Maine fire marshal Shawn Esler said.

The post Firefighter killed, 11 injured in lumber mill explosion and massive fire in Maine appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Firefighter killed and 11 others injured in a Maine lumber mill explosion.
Investigation led by Maine fire marshal Shawn Esler may take time for answers.
Boston residents may face increased fire safety concerns following this tragic incident.

articles.title: Police: Teen allegedly shot girlfriend’s mother in the head on Mother’s Day
articles.description:
Boston police say the shooting stemmed from an argument involving suspect Tyler Broomes and his girlfriend’s family.

The post Police: Teen allegedly shot girlfriend’s mother in the head on Mother’s Day appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Teen Tyler Broomes allegedly shot his girlfriend's mother during a family argument on Mother's Day.
The incident occurred in Boston, raising concerns about youth violence in the community.
Local residents are urged to engage in discussions about family conflict resolution and safety.

articles.title: How would a team made up entirely of former Red Sox look in 2026?
articles.description:
Boston has made a number of high-profile moves for better and worse over the seven seasons since its last World Series.

summary: Boston Red Sox last won the World Series in 2018, impacting fan expectations.

Local fans may feel nostalgia and connection to past players in future seasons.

articles.title: Red Sox’ Roman Anthony no longer wearing wrist brace, played catch Friday
articles.description:
The Red Sox placed Anthony on the 10-day injured list May 7.

The post Red Sox’ Roman Anthony no longer wearing wrist brace, played catch Friday appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Roman Anthony resumed playing catch after recovering from a wrist injury.

His return could boost the Red Sox lineup for upcoming games.

articles.title: Jeep drives into Norwood day care
articles.description:
No injuries were reported after officials said a driver accidentally accelerated into the BrightPath daycare on Friday morning.

The post Jeep drives into Norwood day care appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: A Jeep accidentally drove into BrightPath daycare in Norwood on Friday morning.
No injuries were reported among children or staff at the daycare.
Local officials emphasize the importance of safety measures in daycare facilities.
